founder_correction: 2026-06-24 — 100 is mandatory minimum per turn, NOT up to 100
one_law: Auto Runtime (~10 min) triggers one Cloud Forge Run POST — MUST move 100 queue rows (mandatory quota). Say Cloud Forge Run + Auto Runtime — never drain or loop in founder chat.

asf_order.internal_loop_founder_name: Auto Runtime 100-row internal step (inside one Forge Run POST)
asf_order.batch_tail_exception: when fewer than 100 cloud rows remain in active batch file, Forge Run processes all remaining

definitions.turn: One CF cron or one Cloud Workers Proceed tap
definitions.row: One CLOUD-SEC queue slot SHIPPED (motor PASS + advance_on_pass)
definitions.full_pack: Boolean flag: 100-row internal loop in this HTTP request only
definitions.max_advance: Mandatory row quota per turn — 100 — NOT a soft maximum
definitions.batch: Locked secondary-cloud-forge-run-batch-N JSON on disk — not a cron turn
definitions.processed: equals shipped — must be 100 unless batch tail (INCIDENT-044: zero skips)
definitions.skipped: FORBIDDEN — motor fail halts turn; skipped must always be 0

mandatory_reply_lines: Auto Runtime: one CF cron (~10 min) arms one Cloud Forge Run POST = 100 rows (mandatory quota).
Quote queue head or observer pack.processed — must be 100/100 unless batch tail.
Never say drain or loop to founder — say Cloud Forge Run and Auto Runtime.
forbidden_phrases: wait for the pack to finish across cron

pass_turn_observer_shape.note: INCIDENT-044 — 100 shipped, 0 skipped; motor fail = turn RED not skip-through
